subcodes.title: Words to Mrs. Brittingham, spoken around 1909-10-23
subcodes.first_line: It will begin at midnight, the same as the solar year... In the Arabic there is no difference... These are symbols. Always, hair is the symbol of the glory of God...
subcodes.subjects: @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @grammar and orthography, @symbolism
